name: Spagetti Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a medium frying pan.
2. Saute mushrooms, green peppers, onion, and garlic until tender.
3. Add broccoli, tomato, parsley, and oregano to the pan; heat through, stirring occasionally.
4. Spoon the vegetable mixture over spaghetti; toss well to coat.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste.
6. Sprinkle each serving with Parmesan cheese.
